foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Killian dehiscence between thyropharyngeus and cricopharyngeus is the anatomical basis for Zenker formation

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Oropharyngeal dysphagia with regurgitation of undigested food is the hallmark presentation

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Long-standing Zenker diverticulum carries a small risk of squamous cell carcinoma within the pouch

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Cricopharyngeal dysfunction (failed UES relaxation) is the underlying motility defect causing Zenker

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Pharyngeal manometry can document UES dysfunction and incomplete relaxation
